sections.description: Auto-generate barcodes, design label templates, manage a print queue, and add products in seconds with the mobile Quick Add workflow.
sections.changelog:
1.2.4

  • Fixed: Scanning a draft product barcode in Quick Add showed an error instead of the Scan-to-Publish form. Draft products now show an inline Complete & Publish card directly on the Quick Add page — enter name, take photo, tap Publish and the scanner resets for the next item.

1.2.3

  • Fixed: Barcode lookup missed draft products due to WooCommerce lookup table not covering all statuses.

1.2.2

  • New: Live camera barcode scanner.

1.2.0

  • New: Batch Create and Scan-to-Publish workflow.
